title: lactuca hastata var. paniculata
intro: Lactuca hastata var. paniculata, also known as the panicled prairie lettuce or tall lettuce, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and rheumatism. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in herbal preparations to provide health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. In traditional herbal medicine, Lactuca hastata var. paniculata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
